summary: DevOps foundation delivered for Iteration 1. GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline implemented with automated code quality gates (dart analyze, flutter test) running on every push and PR. APK build job ready for version tag releases. Full deployment documentation completed. Secrets configuration guide and Firebase config injection instructions provided. All artifacts in place.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: .github/workflows/ci.yml (GitHub Actions workflow), docs/DEPLOY.md (deployment guide), docs/handoffs/devops.md (handoff) all created and in place.

qualityGates.name: ci_pipeline_valid
qualityGates.notes: GitHub Actions workflow syntax valid. Jobs: analyze-and-test (required gate on push/PR to main) and build-apk (conditional on version tags). Flutter setup, code generation, dart analyze, flutter test, and APK build steps all configured.

qualityGates.name: secrets_configuration_documented
qualityGates.notes: docs/DEPLOY.md provides table of all 13 required GitHub Actions secrets with purpose, format, and injection method. Base64 encoding instructions for Firebase config files included.

qualityGates.name: deployment_documentation_complete
qualityGates.notes: docs/DEPLOY.md covers local setup, CI pipeline behavior, secrets configuration, release process, APK distribution, and troubleshooting. No ambiguity left for next agent.
